tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Dancing in the kitchen[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
You singing my favorite songs[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Swinging on the front porch[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Just laughing at the dogs[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Now you swear you love me more[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
When you whispering "goodnight"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
All those little moments[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
Are every reason why[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm homesick[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
This feeling that I'm feeling no it don't quit[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
It's like half of me is missing, heaven knows it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
That all I wanna do is be alone with[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
Your brown eyes all tangled up just holding[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Onto you tonight until the morning[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, that's the damn truth[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]D[/ch]               
If home is where the heart is then I'm homesick for you[/tab]

[Break]
[ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Well it says Kane Brown on a sign with a line out the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
    Sold out some little town I never been before[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, they're screaming my name[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
This is what we dreamed about[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
But out here singing about you baby[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
All I'm thinking 'bout is how I'm homesick[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
This feeling that I'm feeling no it don't quit[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
It's like half of me is missing, heaven knows it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
That all I wanna do is be alone with[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
Your brown eyes all tangled up just holding[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Onto you tonight until the morning[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Baby, that's the damn truth[/tab]

If home is where the heart is
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               
I'm homesick for you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  Homesick for you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm homesick[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
This feeling that I'm feeling no it don't quit[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
It's like half of me is missing, heaven knows it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
That all I wanna do is be alone with[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
Your brown eyes all tangled up just holding[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Onto you tonight until the morning[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
Baby that's the damn truth[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]D[/ch]                 
If home is where the heart is I'm homesick for you[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
  I'm homesick for you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah yeah[/tab]
